title: pelargonium × striatum
intro: Pelargonium × striatum, also known as Mountain Rose or Striped Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are often used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Pelargonium × striatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate stress, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pelargonium × striatum is commonly prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine practices to treat a range of ailments.
